metaDescription: Overview, roadmap and next steps for financing partners on MyHome24App.
title: Dashboard for financing partners
subtitle: Here you get an overview of the planned partner area, integrations, roadmap and next steps for working with MyHome24App.

stats.title: Overview & orientation
stats.hint: These values are currently placeholders and will later be connected to real partner and lead data.

profile.title: Partner profile
profile.text: Presentation of contact persons, financing focus, regions and product types.
items: Clear positioning by region and specialization

integration.title: Lead & system integration
integration.text: Step-by-step connection of structured requests and defined contact routes.
items: Clear routing by rules and responsibilities
Clean handovers between platform and partner

compliance.title: Quality & security
compliance.text: Reliable cooperation with clear conditions, data structure and quality standards.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.text: These steps describe the planned expansion for financing partners on MyHome24App.

items.title: Partner profiles
items.text: Creation of structured profiles for banks, brokers and advisors.

items.title: Lead allocation
items.text: Assignment of financing requests by profile, region and product focus.

items.title: Integrations
items.text: Step-by-step technical integration for professional and traceable handovers.

bottomCta.title: Next steps for financing partners
bottomCta.text: Use calculators, contact paths and the next integration steps to build your cooperation with MyHome24App in a structured way.
